name: Cedar d'Moon
description: Emoticon is a member from HALLEY LABS created in 2005, he produces Oldskool Happy Hardcore, he is the father of Rotteen (the head of Halley Labs Rave Division) and has difficulty understanding challenging emotional complexity, likely because due to the path his daughter took. These two have since made amends and often spend entire days together, though he's completely incapable of acting his age.
creator: Macaroni3781
